CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(
ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_1__c, "LVI - SYSTEMS LIVE CELL IMAGING") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_2__c, "LVI - SYSTEMS LIVE CELL IMAGING") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_3__c, "LVI - SYSTEMS LIVE CELL IMAGING"), INCLUDES(Product_Interest__c, "LVI"), INCLUDES(Product_Line__c, "LVI"), INCLUDES(BD_Product_Family_Interest__c, "19-LVI")),
"TRUE", "FALSE")
CustomField.label: Summary-LVI
